top_signals.title: Oil Rises With Bond Yields After US Attack on Iran: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil prices rose while bonds retreated across most of Asia as renewed Middle East tensions sparked fears of energy supply disruptions, complicating the outlook for inflation and interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ukraine has already won the war against Russia, Finnish president tells CNBC
top_signals.summary: Ukraine needs NATO, but NATO needs Ukraine just as much, the Finnish president told CNBC on Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
